narrative:
Blanchester B (precinct in Clinton County) has 488 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.7 percentage points.
